creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jordan Ostreff from comment #2)
> Searching in /usr/ports/Mk dir what is correct value for
> mariadb1011-client-10.11.8_1  ?
> I mean is it DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=mysql=10.11m ?
Yes, 10.11m.

Check Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk:
# Possible values: 8.0, 8.1, 8.4, 10.5m, 10.6m, 10.11m, 11.4m
MYSQL_DEFAULT?=         8.0
